title: Document bundle authority semantics
goal: Clarify latest_complete_bundles authority values and does_not_establish semantics so operators do not overread legacy cache, live discovery or merged authority.

acceptance.assertion: Each authority value is documented with what source it represents and what it does not prove.
User/operator-facing docs distinguish registry availability from bundle freshness, repo understanding, claim truth and runtime correctness.
A doc or contract check prevents removing core does_not_establish entries accidentally.

metadata.reason: PR #103 improved does_not_establish output but did not fully document operator semantics.
